name: Maggie for NH
subject: TOMORROW: Elizabeth Warren in NH
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b7/533699439/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b7/533699439/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hey --
Senator Elizabeth Warren will be in New Hampshire tomorrow to help get out the vote for Governor Hassan and Democrats up and down the ticket -- and **you're invited!** Here are the details:
**_Rochester_**
**WHEN:** Saturday, November 5; 9:30 AM
**WHERE:** Rochester New Hampshire Together Office
22 N Main Street, Rochester, NH 03867
**[RSVP Here](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b0/533699439/VEsF/ "http://hrc.io/2fMFt2t")**

** _Concord_**
**WHEN:** Saturday, November 5; 11:30 AM
**WHERE:** NEA New Hampshire Headquarters
9 S Spring St, Concord, NH 03301
**[RSVP Here](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b1/533699439/VEsC/ "http://hrc.io/2fMF53I")**
With just four short days until the election, it's never been more important to get out there and turn out as many voters as we can. From control of the Senate to the future of the Supreme Court, there's _way_ too much at stake in this election to sit it out. Hope you can make it.
-- Team Maggie
P.S. -- Please remind your friends and neighbors that **they can register to vote in-person on Election Day at their polling place!**
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b2/533699439/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMTA0X1dhcnJlbkdPVFYiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161104_WarrenGOTV&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=12")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd8e/2a380d31/14b374f5/ff03b3/533699439/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

body:

Join Governor Mike Pence and team in Fairfax, VA **tomorrow, Nov. 5th********at 8:00 PM (EST)** for a rally! **Saturday, Nov. 5th: Fairfax, VA**
George Mason University
The HUB
10423 Rivanna River Way
Fairfax, VA 22030

Doors Open: 6:00 PM (EST)
Event Begins: 8:00 PM (EST)
[Get your tickets here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Furldefense.proofpoint.com%2Fv2%2Furl%3Fu%3Dhttps-3A__donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com_r-3Fu-3Dhttps-253A-252F-252Fwww.donaldjtrump.com-252Fschedule-252Fregister-252Ffairfax-2Dva-252F-26e-3D59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7-26utm-5Fsource-3Ddonaldtrump-26utm-5Fmedium-3Demail-26utm-5Fcampaign-3Dva-5Ffairfax-5F5-26n-3D4%26d%3DDQMFaQ%26c%3Decx_Oy7LFev-5AZZypfA9UpMsuBfoOoTkgGzbwCI-s8%26r%3DG_FdiwLmlRqakhhsKYsiN1pz9uYNyRUklhAevojqZRw%26m%3DEAqqisWNsbxE771ngmV5xZp__CriSyj_bZeu5U4WsY8%26s%3DHEmbQk59swU9H_7ZRZ9S2wGtb6y5cj3Ti9YaJJyjiSo%26e%3D&e=59344abb3cc5a27d6398ff61009431f7&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pencegmu&n=2&test_email=1&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=pencegmu5&n=2 "https://www.donaldjtrump.com/schedule/register/fairfax-va/").

I wanted to bring you up to speed on our latest numbers. Unfortunately, things aren't looking good -- and time's running out to do something about it... [****](https://secure.dscc. Friend, I wanted to bring you up to speed on our latest numbers. Unfortunately, things aren't looking good -- [**and only your support can change that.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab?refcode=DPE-20161104-Matt_DS-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Right now we 're in serious danger of falling behind on our pre-election fundraising goal -- just as projections from folks like Nate Silver show a tightening battle.** If we can't turn that around tonight, right-wing money will shut us out of winnable Senate races and paint the map red on Election Night. It's that simple.

I know it's tempting to check Nate Silver's forecasts and hope for the best -- I've even caught myself doing it. **But we need to act now if we 're going to take back the Senate and stop Trump.**

**Can I count on you to pitch in and help us close the deal?**

name: Greg Gianforte
subject: Steve's note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

a note from Senator Daines

Friend,

Did you see Steve's note? It was
great to have him join us on the Whistle Stop Tour this week.

Now we enter the final push. Help
us make one more call, knock one more door, and win one more
vote. Please consider sending $25 today.

Thank you,

Greg

-----------------------------------------------------

Friend,

No Reserves. No Retreats. No
Regrets.

We ONLY have five days remaining
to break the lock that the Democrat machine has maintained for
nearly two decades in our state capital.

After Tuesday, the path that
Montana will take over the next four years will be set without
recourse. We don't get a second chance and we can't ask for a do
over. It is win or lose. All or nothing.

I spent the last few days
campaigning with Greg Gianforte in Billings, Roundup, Harlowton,
Lewistown, Malta, Havre, Great Falls, Conrad and Shelby, and I
know firsthand how hard Greg is working to meet face-to-face with
the people of Montana. Greg is traveling to more than 42 towns
all across Montana in this final week and has driven over 60,000
miles throughout his campaign.

Greg is holding nothing in
reserves and isn't retreating an inch in the fight for more
better paying jobs and less government. Greg will have no regrets
on Tuesday - he will have done everything he can to win.

But that won't be enough. Greg
Gianforte can't win an election by himself. Without your help,
Greg can't get across the finish line and Montana will lose.

Unlike the Democrats in Helena,
Greg isn't beholden to special interests. He doesn't owe anyone
any special favors or handouts.

The special interests don't want
him to win, and are doubling down in their efforts to stop him.

That's why I need you to double
down on your support for Greg today. If you gave $25 to Greg's
campaign, I need you to give $50 now. If you gave $100 before,
please make it $200.

Thanks to your generosity, this
race has been rated a tossup - victory is in sight, but we're not
there yet. With another push and your generous contribution, we
can make it a win.

But if we hold back now, we will
lose. Don't go to bed on Tuesday night wondering what could have
happened if we had done just a little more- if we'd had the
resources to make one more call, knock on one more door, or run
one more ad to share Greg's positive message with Montanans.

Please, help Greg stay strong
through Election Day with one last contribution of $25.

Help Greg stand up to the special
interests.

Help Greg put an end to
Democrats' special favors and backroom deals.

Help Greg create high wage jobs
that keep our kids in Montana.

Help Greg win.

Contribute $25 right now.

Thank you and God Bless,

Steve Daines

Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
**November 4, 2016**

**Media Contact:**
Ethan Latour
[ethan@philscott.org](mailto:ethan@philscott.org)
802-595-3776
**Bennington Banner Endorses Phil Scott for Governor** _Paper’s editorial board credits Scott’s knowledge and understanding of the challenges Vermont faces_
**Middlesex, Vt. –** The _Bennington Banner_ today endorsed Phil Scott for Governor, citing his understanding of how small businesses across industries work, and noting that this understanding will help improve the economy.

In its endorsement, the _Banner writes,_ “Phil Scott is the best choice for Vermont's next governor.”

“While the economy has improved since the Great Recession, recovery has been long and difficult. Few small businesses owners tell us things are easy for them, especially when it comes to taxes, regulations and health care, not to mention simply meeting their payrolls.

“During his time as lieutenant governor, Scott initiated the ‘Vermont Everyday Jobs’ initiative where he travels the state and spends a day working at a small business. He's been to a variety of places and has developed an understanding of how small businesses across a multitude of industries works in Vermont. A governor with a deep understanding of the challenges small businesses face is what's needed in Vermont right now.

“If Scott's approach improves the state's economy, this will open the door to solving other issues the state has been struggling with, namely health care, education costs, and the opioid problem.

“Regarding Act 46, Scott is a strong proponent of school choice, which many local boards and communities want. Much of what's come out of the Legislature in recent years seems to have been rushed. Act 46 created a great deal of confusion locally and statewide. Vermont Health Connect, likewise, was poorly assembled, to put it mildly.

“We wonder what some of these things might have looked like had not one party been in control of the entire state government. Scott, a Republican, might be in a better position to bring balance back to Montpelier.

“Based on what we know of Mr. Scott, he's no obstructionist. He's shown he can work with people from both parties and is widely respected among other seat holders...”

Read the _Banner’s_ full endorsement [here](http://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=bff54b2b59&e=19cebfe173).

name: My Faith Votes
subject: Live on Election Eve w/ the Governor & Lt. Governor of Kansas
body:
A Conversation with Sam Brownback and Jeff Colyer

View this email in your browser.

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with
Sam Brownback and Jeff Colyer
Host: Megan West
Date: NOV 7TH
Time: 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)

"I believe that the core battle of our day is
the battle to defend the inherent dignity of each and every
person, the inherent beauty of each and every soul to be
respected and treated as a beautiful, unique, and sacred child of
a loving God."

-Sam Brownback, Governor of Kansas

On November 8th, the United States will have
its 58th presidential election, and "we the people" will choose
based on our values and hopes for America. The day before the
election, join host, Megan West, and guests Sam Brownback and
Jeff Colyer, Governor and Lt. Governor of Kansas and be a part of
a timely conversation as we discuss:

The dignity of life from a "whole life"
perspective
The importance of selecting judges and
justices who share our values

The significance of state and local
elections

This informative My Faith Matters LIVE
Conversation with Sam Brownback and Jeff Colyer will be streamed
live over the Internet at MyFaithVotes.org and Facebook Live, or
if you are on the move, sign up for our interactive call and
listen on your phone.

Join the conversation on Monday, November
7TH!

My Faith Votes exists to inspire and motivate
Jesus followers to vote. We are a non-partisan movement of the
Church in America.

My Faith Votes
presents
My Faith Matters LIVE: A Conversation with
Sam Brownback and Jeff Colyer
Host: Megan West
Date: NOV 7TH
Time: 8PM (ET) / 5PM (PT)

name: Bill Cole
subject: **Final day to vote early**
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
| | Friend -- Today is the last day to vote early ahead of Election Day, as such, I wanted to send you one final reminder to head to the polls if you haven't already!

There is no margin for error in this race:_**Every vote will count.

**_ Early voting polling location hours vary by county, so be sure to check the hours of operation in your area by [**clicking here.**](http://www.billcolewv.com/r?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sos.wv.gov%2Felections%2Fvote%2Fearlyvoting%2Fpages%2Fdefault.aspx&e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ev_last&n=1 "Early Voting Information") [

Thanks for you support throughout the campaign! To victory,
Bill

subject: Why we vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Make a plan for Tuesday now. |

Friend, We’re down to the wire—Election Day is just 4 days away. It’s been a long election season, but now you will finally have the chance to use your voice for change. Do you know where you will vote? Find out your polling location here. It is time for fresh vision in Washington. We deserve safety and security within the borders, and leaders that put the American people first. We deserve to have our voices heard. On Tuesday, you will have the opportunity to help Make America Great Again. If you haven’t yet, mark Election Day on your calendar, find a time that works for you to get to the polls, and visit Vote.GOP to find critical information on your polling location. We can’t win without you. Make a plan to vote today! Thank you for standing with Donald J. Trump, the Republican ticket, and the American people! Thanks, Reince Priebus Chairman, RNC
Find My Polling Location

name: Michael Barnhill, Team Cooper
subject: Last chance to vote early!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Today is the final opportunity to take advantage of one-stop early voting. That means if you aren't registered, you can still register AND vote -- but only if you go to the polls today.
Today is the final opportunity to take advantage of one-stop early voting. That means if you aren't registered, you can still register AND vote -- but only if you go to the polls today.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202abf/2fde7c66/436d3d69/15693db7/4220461679/VEsH/ "http://www.iWillVote.com")
---
Friends, Today is the final opportunity to take advantage of one-stop early voting. That means if you aren't registered, you can still register AND vote -- but only if you go to the polls today. In most counties across North Carolina, polling locations are closing at 1pm. **[If you aren't sure where to vote or when your polling location closes, you can find out all of that information at www.iWillVote.com!](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202abf/2fde7c66/436d3d69/15693db7/4220461679/VEsE/ "http://www.iWillVote.com")** I can't thank you enough for your support. Let's finish this thing strong and elect Roy as our next governor. Sincerely, Michael Barnhill
Organizing Director
Cooper for North Carolina | | [**Find out where to vote early ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202abf/2fde7c66/436d3d69/15693db7/4220461679/VEsF/ "http://www.iWillVote.com")
---

* * *

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eric=20Trump?=
subject: RE: Our winning ad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
We only have 8 hours to get it up in NINE states. |

Friend, Our last ad we showed you did so well that we decided to release a new one -- and go even bigger with a last-minute $4 MILLION final ad-buy. It’s an UNPRECEDENTED two-minute ad that presents voters with the true stakes of this historic election. But we only have until 9PM EST TONIGHT to get it up in NINE battleground states where polls are drastically tightening. When you’re finished watching our ad, please consider making a contribution to help us get this ad on the air. Contribute $144 to help with 180 seconds of airtime Contribute $96 to help with 120 seconds of airtime Contribute $48 to help with 60 seconds of airtime Contribute $24 to help with 30 seconds of airtime Contribute $8 to help with 10 seconds of airtime CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT In less than 60 hours, Americans have the opportunity to stand up to the corrupt establishment responsible for our disastrous trade deals, lost jobs, massive illegal immigration, and economic and foreign policies that have bled our country dry. The only thing that can stop this corrupt machine is you. The only force strong enough to save our country is us. The only people brave enough to vote out this corrupt establishment is you, the American people. Things might look grim for our country today. But our campaign is built on the idea that we can usher in a future brighter than our past, and revive the American Dream for all Americans. Hillary is the candidate of yesterday. We are the movement of the future. I know you’re already on board. But we need to show the rest of the country what’s at stake, and the real change we’re prepared to deliver. Please make a contribution of $48 to help us get this ad on the air in NINE battleground states during the FINAL 60 hours of the election. Thanks, Eric Trump Contribute $48 to help with 60 seconds of airtime

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

| Big news everyone.

**We 're opening up our FINAL MATCH PROGRAM of the election.**

And it couldn't come a better time, either. Recent _CNN_ and _OS_ polls show the race is statistically TIED. But it's not all good news... Marco Rubio and his special interests are **outspending us four-to-one.**

**We have to raise $100,000 in the next 24 hours -- and the match program will help us get there.[_But without your help, we won 't make it. Can you rush in a contribution?_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e13/738133e4/338ea3eb/7f85874d/2656403524/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161105?refcode=pme161105_m&recurring=true&amount=25")**

There are just 72 hours left until Election Day.

We need to fully fund our GOTV efforts if we want to win and turn the Senate blue. **We can 't do that without your help.**

[_**Take advantage of the match program -- it 's the very last one. Whatever you give will be doubled. Give what you can ASAP>>**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e13/738133e4/338ea3eb/7f85874d/2656403524/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161105?refcode=pme161105_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

name: Aisling Kerins, JayInslee.com
subject: URGENT: voting update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Can you help this weekend? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgyMjAzOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDM3Mzc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, | [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=OTgyMjAzOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDM3Mzc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
We've just received updated information on the number of ballots returned.
**Here 's what we know:**
* Over 4 million Washingtonians are registered to vote
* Right now, over 1.5 million ballots have been returned
* That means there are still over two million more votes to be cast AND returned

**With four days left, and millions of ballots to be returned, we must reach these voters this weekend with Jay 's message. To do it we need a surge of voter outreach to make sure our Get Out the Vote program reaches everyone who has not voted:**
[**Will you help us out right now with a contribution? Any amount you can give will go straight to our final push to reach likely voters.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgyMjAzOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDM3Mzc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We'll be working nonstop from now until Election Day to make sure these voters hear from us.
**And your help makes it all possible.**
Thank you for helping with our final GOTV push,
Aisling Kerins
Campaign Director
[**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=OTgyMjAzOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDM3Mzc4NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Andrew Whalen, Koster for Missouri
subject: a powerful message from Chris you can't miss
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1583289473531770880/6613115540221593600)
Listen, this matters.
In the flood of campaigns ads, heated rhetoric, and constant news coverage, it might be easy to get jaded about this year's election. But yesterday in Harrisonville, where he started his career of public service as a county prosecutor, Chris gave a powerful message to a fired crowd about what's at stake for Missouri families on Tuesday -- **and you just can 't miss it.**
[**WATCH CHRIS ' POWERFUL MESSAGE ON THIS ELECTION**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1583289473531770880/6613115540221593600)
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1583289473531770880/6613115540221593600)
Chris is right -- if we're going to have a proven leader **who truly knows and cares about our state 's communities** as our next governor, we need you to do more than just vote on election day. We need you to knock doors, make calls, and tell everyone you know what's at stake for every Missouri family on election day.
[**Share Chris 's message right now**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1583289473531770880/6613115540221593600), and then **[sign up to get connected with our team](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1583289473531770880/6685173134259521536?utm_campaign=_GOTV_&utm_medium=social&utm_source=Koster&ms=soc16161105GOTVclq&refcode=soc16161105GOTVclq)** in your area as a volunteer.
Thanks for always having our backs,
Andrew Whalen, Campaign Manager

Paid for by Koster for Missouri, Gary Mallory, Treasurer

Jefferson City MO 65102 United States

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: Join Us: Election Night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Many thanks for all your support for our grassroots campaign across this beautiful state. |
Dear friend

Many thanks for all your support for our grassroots campaign across this beautiful state. As a result of your help, we are in a strong position as we head toward Election Day. Still, we must spend every hour between now and then reminding voters they must go to the polls on Tuesday to decide the future direction of our state and nation.

Once the hard work is done, and after the polls close, I hope you will join Katherine and me at an Election Night Party that we are hosting together with Maryland Congressional candidates Anthony Brown and Jamie Raskin, the Maryland Clinton campaign and the Maryland Democratic Party. The party will be held at the Tommy Douglas Conference Center (the old National Labor College) at 10000 New Hampshire Avenue in Silver Spring. The doors will open after the polls close at 8:00 p.m.

We look forward to seeing you there. Please email [kaila@vanhollen.org](mailto:kaila@vanhollen.org) to RSVP.

Thank you, again, for your activism in this 2016 election.

Onwards!

Chris [DONATE](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b7e/70cdc2ba/47309a72/39785e6/2251117515/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/cvh-keep-fighting?refcode=em110316_1&amount=25.00&recurring=12")
---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b7e/70cdc2ba/47309a72/39785e7/2251117515/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Tim Henderson, GreggForGovernor.com
subject: Nervous about this poll?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
A new poll reports that this race is tied. Here's what you can do about it.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4307121723649161216/-7005769732946786304?utm_campaign=fld_gotvol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161105_fld_gq_gotvol_40mile__th)
---
Peter, Yesterday, a new poll reported that this race is tied: 42 to 42. And it's making folks very nervous. But wasting time biting our nails won't win this race -- talking to voters will. Now, more than ever, we need you to do your part, because it could make all the difference. **[Find a local office now and do your part to get out the vote.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4307121723649161216/-7005769732946786304?utm_campaign=fld_gotvol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161105_fld_gq_gotvol_40mile__th)** This race could be even closer than when Mike Pence won by just 81,644 votes in 2012. Each door you knock or phone call you make could push this campaign over the top. We can't afford to let Indiana move backward -- but that's what could happen if you don't help us now. **[Do your part to get out the vote. Find your closest office now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4307121723649161216/-7005769732946786304?utm_campaign=fld_gotvol_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&source=em16_161105_fld_gq_gotvol_40mile__th)** We're counting on you, Tim Henderson

name: Robby Mook, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Do your friends know where to vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
You can help your friends vote. | We’re less than 85 hours away from polls opening on Election Day -- it’s getting real, Derek!

This team is focused on one thing right now: getting voters to the polls. And right now, that means making sure everyone we can possibly reach knows where they need to go to cast their ballot.

Do two things right now: First, get your details squared away and confirm your polling place right here:

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/locate/](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Then pass this along to friends who need to check their polling places, too. **Share it on Facebook and tag three people who you think might not be as on top of it as you are:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
This team can make history in three days -- let’s go.

Robby

Robby Mook
Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

|
**Will you Get Out the Vote for Hillary?**
Sign up for a volunteer shift (or two or three) in the final days before Election Day:
| [
](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=2&rj=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&rt=0)
---

**** | | Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2.6 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Opening this email on your iPhone? [Click here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to get our Hillary 2016 mobile app now. Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY5ODYwMjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTE0MTkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

**_ABC News_ : Indiana's Senate race is "within the margin of error"**
**[Make sure it breaks for Evan! Chip in $5 today>>](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f9/7be36b49/1e227b47/78f995c1/840624940/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161105nd&amount=10")**

**But we 're hoping to change that this weekend.** **We have a plan to contact ****one million Hoosier voters** **by Monday -- something we can only do with your help. ****[Will you pitch in $5 right away to boost Team Bayh's Get Out The Vote effort?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f9/7be36b49/1e227b47/78f995c1/840624940/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161105nd&amount=10")**** | ****_Get Out The Vote Fund_

Here's what we're up against: Mitch McConnell's Super PAC just pumped ANOTHER $12 million into six states including Indiana.

****But we can beat them with people power._Specifically, one million people!_****

Friend, every dollar you give will go immediately to critical GOTV needs like gas, signs, ads, and more**.**[You can make the biggest difference yet by pitching in $5 right now.](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a505f9/7be36b49/1e227b47/78f995c1/840624940/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-finalstretch?refcode=20161105nd&amount=10")** **Please help.

name: Chuck Flannery, Friends of Cole
subject: Exciting Days Ahead!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF COLE
body:
---
| Friend -- It's going to be a big weekend for Team Cole. This is the last weekend ahead of Election Day on Tuesday, and we couldn't be more excited. Bill Cole is the most experienced candidate in the race, and will ensure a more prosperous West Virginia. Bill will be traveling around the state on Sunday & Monday holding several rallies ahead of Tuesday's vote, and we would love to see you at one of them! To find out if Bill will be in your area, visit: [http://www.billcolewv.com/come_meet_bill_cole

](http://www.billcolewv.com/come_meet_bill_cole?e=6827555c47a2f041f636b0c6a0edbd27&utm_source=billcole&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=events_email&n=1)**Special guests include:
**
\-- Shelley Moore Capito - _U.S. Senator_**
** \-- Evan Jenkins - _U.S. Representative_ \-- Ann Worely - _Democrats for Cole Co-Chair_ \-- Woody Williams - _Democrats for Cole Co-Chair_ \-- David McKinley - _U.S. Representative_ \-- Patrick Morrisey - _West Virginia Attorney General

_ \-- Alex Mooney - _U.S. Representative_

We look forward to seeing you in the coming days! Chuck Flannery
Campaign Manager | Cole for Governor

subject: Last Chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
With the election 3 days away an incredible opportunity for... |

Friend, This is your last opportunity to have your support of Donald J. Trump and our candidates for the Senate and the House triple matched before Election Day. I sincerely hope you will take advantage today. I just heard from Chairman Priebus and a small group of generous supporters who are fed up with the deceitful, vicious attack ads they’re seeing from Hillary Clinton and her liberal allies. Furthermore, they are disgusted with the mainstream media seemingly taking their orders from the Clinton camp. This group has decided to step forward right now and triple match any donation made before midnight tonight. Friend, that means your gift today of $55 will be immediately triple matched for a real impact of $220. The money we are able to raise during this final triple match will be put into our advertising and critical Get-Out-the-Vote operation, which will be pivotal in electing Republicans up and down the ballot. I chose to write you Friend, because I know you are committed to winning the White House and keeping our majorities in Congress. You also know what we’re up against and what it will take to win in less than one week. So please take action right now with your generous contribution of $25, $55, $100, or even $250. Remember the triple match is ONLY in effect until midnight so please act today. Thank you, Newt Gingrich P.S. Friend, as long as you give before midnight, every dollar you donate will be triple matched by a group of supporters. Please help us fund our final GOTV operations before it’s too late. CONTRIBUTE $55

clean_body: With the election 3 days away an incredible opportunity for... | Friend, This is your last opportunity to have your support of Donald J. Trump and our candidates for the Senate and the House triple matched before Election Day. I sincerely hope you will take advantage today. I just heard from Chairman Priebus and a small group of generous supporters who are fed up with the deceitful, vicious attack ads they’re seeing from Hillary Clinton and her liberal allies. Furthermore, they are disgusted with the mainstream media seemingly taking their orders from the Clinton camp. This group has decided to step forward right now and triple match any donation made before midnight tonight. Friend, that means your gift today of $55 will be immediately triple matched for a real impact of $220. The money we are able to raise during this final triple match will be put into our advertising and critical Get-Out-the-Vote operation, which will be pivotal in electing Republicans up and down the ballot. I chose to write you Friend, because I know you are committed to winning the White House and keeping our majorities in Congress. You also know what we’re up against and what it will take to win in less than one week. So please take action right now with your generous contribution of $25, $55, $100, or even $250. Remember the triple match is ONLY in effect until midnight so please act today. Thank you, Newt Gingrich P.S. Friend, as long as you give before midnight, every dollar you donate will be triple matched by a group of supporters. Please help us fund our final GOTV operations before it’s too late. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: President of UVM Student Government Urges College Students to Vote for Phil Scott
body:
| | | **President of UVM Student Gov. Urges College Students to Vote Phil Scott**
---
[View this email in your browser](http://us13.campaign-archive2.com/?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=a1e9351d9e&e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:**
Saturday, November 5, 2016
**President of UVM Student Government Urges College Students to Vote for Phil Scott**

**_Says vote for Scott ‘to build a more affordable, economically vibrant Vermont...where you can stay, work and live after you graduate’_**
Burlington, Vt. – University of Vermont student government president Jason Maulucci released the following endorsement of Phil Scott for Governor:
**Phil Scott is Right Choice to Move Vermont Forward ** “During an election cycle in which the two major party nominees for president are as unpopular as they are, it is easy for voters to become disengaged and turned off by the political process. These sentiments are especially detrimental for the many down-ballot races whose results often have the most direct impact on people’s daily lives. So while the national debate continues to rage with millions of dollars being spent attempting to bring their opponents down, it is critical for folks to look into the candidates running in their own backyards.

“Here in Vermont, there is a compassionate, hard-working candidate running for Governor whose issue-oriented, positive campaign should be a model for all those who seek to run for office. His name is Phil Scott. Lieutenant Governor Scott is the type of public servant Vermont needs in the governor’s office to move this state forward. He is an experienced problem solver who knows how to work with anybody, regardless of party, in order to get things done.

“As Lieutenant Governor, Scott has established a reputation for being someone who puts people ahead of party, results over who gets the credit, and somebody who treats everybody with the dignity and respect that they deserve. As a small business owner, Scott also understands the hardships that so many Vermonters are facing every day just trying to get by.

“With fewer people working in Vermont than there were just 7 years ago, an aging population and the cost of living continuingly on the rise, Scott knows that the next governor must prioritize and focus like-a-laser on the economy.

“There are so many of us at UVM who have a deep affection for Vermont. We love the community, the breathtaking landscapes and the people. And, when we graduate, we’d love to stick around here, too. Yet, as we’ve seen from our friends who’ve graduated, there simply isn’t the economic opportunity here needed to attract and retain young talent. Students, after working hard for years in college — racking up debt from student loans — have to leave the place they love in or- der to find jobs that will pay the bills.

“Additionally, those of us who have lived off-campus know just how expensive it is to live here. Nationally, it is recommended that one spend no more than a third of their income on housing.

“Here in Burlington, however, nearly 50 percent of people are spending more than 50 percent of their incomes on housing. That percentage only increases when you take a look of those under the age of 30. Scott knows that these trends are simply unsustainable.

“Vermont’s population has been relatively stagnant over the past couple of decades at roughly 625,000 people. Yet, since the last census, there are nearly 30,000 fewer people in the state who are between the ages of 25 and 45.
When you think about that a step further, that 25 to 45 age demographic is your workforce. They are the ones who are starting businesses, buying homes, raising families and, importantly, paying taxes.

“They are “us” when we graduate from UVM. When there are 30,000 fewer of them, the financial burden is spread on those who are still here in Vermont. Increasingly, those remaining to foot the bill are seniors living on fixed incomes who can no longer afford their retirement so they themselves either have to leave the state or go back to work.

“If we don’t enact policies that help attract businesses to the state, make Vermont more conducive to starting new companies and drive down the cost of living, we won’t have the revenue we beed to invest in important areas like higher education.

“We need someone in Montpelier who understands these issues and will work tirelessly with anybody to address these challenges. Phil Scott will be that governor. He has a wide range of support from both Democrats and Republicans.
He doesn’t just say he’ll bring both parties together; he’s actually done it. He doesn’t just sympathize with small business owners struggling to get by; he’s been in their shoes.

“Phil Scott lives by the golden rule and is a true public servant. If you want to build a more affordable, economically vibrant Vermont, a place where you can stay, work and live after you graduate, and elect someone who runs their campaigns in a way that we can all be proud of, I urge you to join me and vote for Phil Scott to be our next governor November 8th.”

_Jason Maulucci is a senior at the University of Vermont, president of the Student Government Association and an intern at Phil Scott for Vermont. This commentary first appeared in [UVM’s VT Cynic newspaper](http://philscott.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=15d5e9b091&e=19cebfe173)._

Phil Scott for Vermont46 Three Mile Bridge RoadMiddlesex, Vt 05602

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Russ Feingold's lead has been clawed away
disclaimer_text: paid for by Russ for Wisconsin, Joe Sensenbrenner, Madison, WI, Treasurer
body:
No Senate race is more important to me -- and to the future of our democracy -- than Wisconsin. | [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496e/740349495/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema") Friend, The polls in our battleground Senate races have me chewing my fingernails off. But nowhere am I more concerned than in Wisconsin -- where our champ Russ Feingold's lead has been clawed away to just one point. A statistical tie. The Republicans and their powerful friends believe that if they just spend an obscene amount of money in Wisconsin these last few days, they can pound Russ into the dirt and buy themselves the Senate majority. That's why they're spending $10 million to help Tea Party radical Ron Johnson between now and Election Day. **We'll never be able to match Ron Johnson's billionaire buddies dollar-for-dollar (unless you've been hiding $1 0 million under your mattress for a rainy day). But we have something they don't: YOU. And together, this grassroots team is going to prove the GOP and its Super PACs wrong by sending Russ to the Senate Tuesday night.** **[Russ needs to raise $500,000 by Election Day to fully fund his get-out- the-vote efforts. I know it's a heavy lift, but can you send $5 -- or whatever you can afford -- to help our friend Russ Feingold?](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496e/740349495/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema")** [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496e/740349495/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema") [](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496e/740349495/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema") _Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496f/740349495/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane=true&amount=5")

| | [Other »](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496a/740349495/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema&express_lane_other")

I don't need to remind you what's at stake in this election, because the difference is clear as daylight. Ron Johnson is the Koch Brothers' "model Senator." He's one of the few Republican leaders who never wavered in his support of Donald Trump.
And when it comes to student debt, raising the minimum wage, protecting Social Security, equal pay for equal work -- you name it, and Ron Johnson consistently sides with the billionaires and giant corporations, not working families.
And what about Russ? He was our fighter long before I got to Washington. He's spent his whole career sanding up to the powerful interests -- fighting for students, for seniors, for women, for workers, for a level playing field -- and that's just what he'll do in the Senate.
That's why Senator Johnson has had the support of not one, not two, but THREE super PACs -- as well as SIXTEEN right-wing groups -- all crushing Russ with nasty, bogus attacks.
I'll be blunt: There is no path to a Democratic majority in the Senate without Wisconsin. And nobody will fight harder for the issues we care about than Russ. Everything is on the line in the next four days of this campaign.
**No Senate race is more important to me -- and to the future of our democracy -- than Wisconsin. That's why I'm asking: Will you help us raise $500, 000 to fully fund Russ's get out the vote efforts?**
**[Contribute $5 right now to help send a rock-solid progressive to fight for us in the Senate.](http://action.russfeingold.com/page/m/66cf4691/1c469400/17995a8/354496e/740349495/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/rdf-nov?utm_source=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&refcode=ema_2016-11-05_EW_ND&utm_campaign=EW&utm_medium=ema")**
Thanks for being a part of this, and GO RUSS!
Elizabeth

"" "" "" Or, if your payment information is saved with ActBlue, click below and your contribution will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" I don't need to remind you what's at stake in this election, because the difference is clear as daylight. Ron Johnson is the Koch Brothers' "model Senator." He's one of the few Republican leaders who never wavered in his support of Donald Trump. And when it comes to student debt, raising the minimum wage, protecting Social Security, equal pay for equal work -- you name it, and Ron Johnson consistently sides with the billionaires and giant corporations, not working families. And what about Russ? He was our fighter long before I got to Washington. He's spent his whole career sanding up to the powerful interests -- fighting for students, for seniors, for women, for workers, for a level playing field -- and that's just what he'll do in the Senate. That's why Senator Johnson has had the support of not one, not two, but THREE super PACs -- as well as SIXTEEN right-wing groups -- all crushing Russ with nasty, bogus attacks. I'll be blunt: There is no path to a Democratic majority in the Senate without Wisconsin. And nobody will fight harder for the issues we care about than Russ. Everything is on the line in the next four days of this campaign. No Senate race is more important to me -- and to the future of our democracy -- than Wisconsin. That's why I'm asking: Will you help us raise $500, 000 to fully fund Russ's get out the vote efforts? "" Thanks for being a part of this, and GO RUSS! Elizabeth ""

| We're coming up on a lot of "lasts" soon.

It's the **last weekend of the campaign** to run a strong GOTV effort.

**And today we announced our very last matching program to help us hit that goal. This is it.**

[_**Whatever you give today toward our $100,000 goal will be doubled. Can you rush in a contribution?**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e10/738133e4/3382e89d/7f85b8de/1222837092/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161105pm?refcode=pme161105pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

If we're going to defeat Marco Rubio and his special interest allies, we have to fully fund our GOTV program. That's how we get Floridians to the polls and Patrick over the finish line.

**If we don 't hit this $100,000 goal, we will have to make cuts.** I'm not ready to let that happen -- with a race this close we can't afford it.

[_**Today you can have double the impact -- for the very. Last. Time. So make it count. Give $5 or more.**_](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e10/738133e4/3382e89d/7f85b8de/1222837092/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme161105pm?refcode=pme161105pm_m&recurring=true&amount=25")

Thanks,

Josh Wolf

We hope you can join us! name: Tim Kaine
subject: Monday: Join me in Northern Virginia before Election Day!
body:
| Derek --

Joining Hillary on this ticket has been one of the most amazing experiences of my life. Meeting everyday Americans and hearing your stories is both inspiring and humbling, and I couldn’t be more grateful for the warm welcome I’ve received from you on the campaign trail.

[**On Monday, the day before Election Day, Anne and I will be hosting a rally in Northern Virginia and I would love to see you there. Can you make it? **](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

I want to share our vision for America with you -- and talk about making our economy work for everyone, improving access to healthcare, and making it possible for all kids to graduate from college debt-free. Hillary has the strength, tenacity, and experience to meet these challenges head on, but she’s going to need help from her best supporters like you to get there.

**Tuesday is Election Day, so there’s no time to waste. I can’t wait to make the case to you and other Virginians for Hillary. Space is limited, so RSVP now to reserve your spot:**
[](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
See you there,

Tim

|
**We need your help to Get Out the Vote. Will you sign up for a shift (or three) in the final days of the election?
| [

---

***If you've attended events in the past or have an account on HillaryClinton.com, click the button to be automatically confirmed.**
| Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 3 million donors committed to electing Hillary Clinton (and keeping Donald Trump out of the White House).
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just click [here](https://www.hillaryclinton.com/forms/contact-us/) to send us a message! If you'd like more information on key policies, visit [hillaryclinton.com/issues](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to receive less email and click [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Puedes encontrar más información sobre la campaña de Hillary en español [aquí](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0). If you're still reading this, you must be a really dedicated Hillary supporter. [Yee-haw for you](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY5ODgwNTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTIwOTgxNDEzS0&mt=1&rt=0)! Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president. Hillary for America, P.O. name: Corry Bliss
subject: 80 stops. 4,000 miles. 35 counties.
body:
| Peter \--

With three days left until Election Day, Rob and our team are working hard to win on Tuesday. Just this week, we took the Countdown to Victory RV Tour to Cincinnati, Columbus, Dayton, Bellefontaine, Akron, Brecksville, Cleveland, Richfield, Lima, West Chester, Oxford, and today Rob just left Terrace Park and is headed to Centerville, Delaware and Columbus!

Our incredible interns and volunteers have worked hard over the past two years, contacting more than 5.4 million voters, and we wouldn't be where we are without them. Ohio voters are supporting Rob because of his record of getting results for Ohio workers and families, and they know Ohio simply can't afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when the state lost 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation.

Be on the lookout for our Countdown to Victory RV Tour, and be sure to cast your vote for Rob and keep Ohio moving forward! Sincerely,

Corry Bliss [](https://www.robportman.com/donate?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update2&n=1 "Donate here!") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update2&n=2)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update2&n=3)

---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](http://www.robportman.com/unsubscribe?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ctvrv_update2&n=4). -=-=-

subject: Down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
It’s too close to call – this race will come down to the wire. JOIN NOW with an emergency contribution to help me win. |

Friend, Have you seen the latest polls? We’re SURGING ahead in these final days of the campaign. This is a moment of incredible opportunity for our country. But right now, with 3 days to go, the race is too close to call. It’s going to come down to the wire on Election Day. We can’t let up, and I need you on board. THIS IS OUR CHANCE to end the rigged system and Make America Great Again – JOIN NOW to help me WIN. CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $50 CONTRIBUTE $100 CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT Crooked Hillary’s lies are catching up with her, and our ads and ground game efforts are making a big impact – my message is resonating, and today undecided voters are breaking our way in huge numbers. The American people know that a Trump presidency will mean the REAL change our country needs. I will END Obamacare. I will fix the bad trade deals and cut taxes, to bring back jobs. And I will secure our borders, fix our schools and cities, and protect the Constitution. But first we need to win – your emergency support is crucial to our get-out-the-vote efforts, so JOIN TEAM TRUMP TODAY. Don’t delay. Every donation will help us close strong and win on Tuesday. Thank you, Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. With just 3 days to go I need you on board now more than ever. We’re surging ahead in the polls, and this race is going to come down to the wire. Join now to help me finish strong and win, so I can get to work for you in the White House. CONTRIBUTE $100

body:

Flipping the Senate is the only way to protect Social Security, marriage equality, and women's reproductive rights. **But we can only do it if our candidates have the resources they need.**

Falling short by even one seat lets the Party of Trump off the hook. [**Friend, will you QUADRUPLE your support to help us hit the last goal of this race?**](https://secure.dscc. name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Greitens?=
subject: Three Days!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer
body:
Peter,
Just a few days to go before Election Day! We still need your help to Get Out The Vote (http://www.ericgreitens.com/gotv?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) and defeat the Clinton-Koster machine. (http://www.ericgreitens.com/gotv?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) Hillary Clinton is putting every available resource behind Chris Koster. They're flying in liberal activists from all over the country to help advance their pro-Obamacare, pro-abortion agenda. We need everyone on Team Greitens to dig deep and make calls (http://www.ericgreitens.com/gotv?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) to turn out the vote (http://www.ericgreitens.com/gotv?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) in these final days.

Our final Barnstorming Tour (https://ericgreitens.com/2016/11/03/3253/?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=93e5a85c8a-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-93e5a85c8a-&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) to Columbia, Hannibal, Kirksville, St. Joseph, Lee's Summit, Joplin, Springfield, and Cape Girardeau will end with a final rally in St. Louis on Monday night! This campaign has been about uniting people around a common mission: bringing much-needed change to our state. Come rally with other supporters one last time in the final hours before we all go to the polls!

Also, please plan to join us Tuesday night at our Election Watch Party (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-election-night-party-tickets-29127516185?utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Master+List&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) with volunteers, supporters, and the Greitens family to celebrate this mission and what we expect to be a great night. The party will be in St. Louis at the Doubletree Chesterfield Hotel starting at 7:00 PM on Tuesday. Hope you can join us! Click here to register and get details. (https://www.eventbrite.com/e/eric-greitens-election-night-party-tickets-29127516185?utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_source=Master+List&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-&utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629)

-Team Greitens

Paid for by Greitens for Missouri, Jeff Stuerman, Treasurer

4579 Laclede Avenue #138
St. Louis, Missouri 63108

Eric is a former member of the United States Navy having served four deployments overseas. Use of his military rank, titles and photographs in uniform does not imply an endorsement from the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

This email was sent to dpwillis67+greitens@gmail.com. You can also follow us on Facebook (https://facebook.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) and Twitter (https://twitter.com/ericgreitens?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) . Emails are one of the best ways to stay connected with the campaign. If they become too much, you can unsubscribe (http://ericgreitens.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c81357bdb59fb170d9eb82b3a&id=3f71c40094&e=84041254e6&c=ecbdff7533) , but please let us know how we can improve. You can always reach us at team@ericgreitens.com (mailto:team@ericgreitens.com) or (314) 899-0288. You're still reading the fineprint? You must be a detail oriented, all-around awesome person who is a big supporter — you should volunteer (http://ericgreitens.com/volunteer?utm_source=Master+List&utm_campaign=ecbdff7533-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2016_11_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_3f71c40094-ecbdff7533-99411629) with us!

name: VOLUNTEERS (JayInslee.com)
subject: Need your help this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Can you help with our final push? [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTgyNDA4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDQzMzkyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| Dear Friend, This is it -- the final weekend to vote before Election Day -- and millions of ballots remain unreturned. **It comes down to this: Our campaign must make sure our supporters vote and get their ballots postmarked no later than Election Day or returned to a ballot drop box by 8 p .m.!** We know that Republicans, including Bill Bryant and Donald Trump, are making a strong play. Republican PAC's have even sent mail telling you if your neighbors have voted. Even with the polls showing the tide running against the Republican Party here in Washington, the GOP is still working hard. **It 's essential that Democrats outwork Republicans everywhere in Washington between now and Election Day to ensure Jay's victory. We can't leave anything to chance.** That's why we're making this last weekend appeal directly to you. Whether you can knock doors, make calls, or help around the office...Please help us reach every supporter before it's too late. We all want our governor's race to finish strong -- your support will make that happen! [**If you can help -- even for just an hour or two -- please sign up here. We can get you working right away.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTgyNDA4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDQzMzkyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0) Your work has always meant so much to Jay and Trudi. Thank you for standing with us again. Thanks, Team Inslee | [**VOLUNTEER »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTgyNDA4NwS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA0MDQzMzkyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

name: Lucinda Guinn, EMILY's List
subject: FWD: Will you help them like you helped me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c756f/24c69fd9/67e1160/18ed2c2f/3083932781/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all&source=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

It's true what Sen. Elizabeth Warren said: We're with our EMILY's List candidates every step of the way.

We're just three days out from Election Day, and we're committed to helping our endorsed women as much as we possibly can. Many of them are still in races that are too close to call, so they need us to step it up.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win on Tuesday:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Have-Candidates-Backs](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c756f/24c69fd9/67e1160/18ed2c28/3083932781/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHaveCandidatesBa&utm_campaign=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all&source=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all")**

Thank you,

Lucinda Guinn
Vice President of Campaigns, EMILY's List

_\--------- Original Message ----------
**From:** Senator Elizabeth Warren
**Sent:** Thurs, Nov 3, 2016 at 11:36 a.m._

Hi there,

When I was thinking about running for Senate, EMILY's List President Stephanie Schriock was one of the first people who reached out.

Stephanie came to my home, sat on the couch, rubbed the dog's ears, and said two things: One, here's what running for the Senate would look like, from talking to voters to raising money to what it's like to be in the public eye. Two, if I'd take on this fight, she promised the EMILY's List community would be there every step of the way.

And it was true -- you were there every step of the way.

So many women running for office this year are also grateful that you've been there for them every step of the way -- and they're counting on that same commitment in these final days of the election.

We've got a presidency to win, a Senate to flip, a House to clean up, and over 100 women running for state and local office that EMILY's List has endorsed. And we've only got five days left to make sure they win.

**[These candidates are all counting on your support just like I did. Donate to EMILY's List-- whatever you can afford -- to have their backs in these final days.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c756f/24c69fd9/67e1160/18ed2c29/3083932781/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+These+candidates+are+all+counting+on+you&utm_campaign=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all&source=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all")**

I've been on the campaign trail in states like Nevada, New Hampshire, Pennsylvania, and North Carolina, rallying volunteers, raising money, and doing everything I can to help progressive Democrats in tough races this year. And -- this probably won't surprise you -- a LOT of them are EMILY's List candidates.

That's because EMILY's List isn't afraid of the tough fights. Several of the most competitive Senate races that are key to flipping the Senate? EMILY's List candidates. Twenty-one House seats that could turn from red to blue? EMILY's List candidates.

And our terrific candidate for president, Hillary Clinton? EMILY's List is going to help her shatter the highest glass ceiling of all.

That's how women candidates fight back against all the money and negative attacks and skepticism that women just aren't tough enough for these fights. With EMILY's List.

You never left my side in 2012, and I know you'll do the same for the women of 2016.

**Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women win next Tuesday:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Have-Candidates-Backs](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c756f/24c69fd9/67e1160/18ed2c2a/3083932781/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgHaveCandidatesBa&utm_campaign=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all&source=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all")**

Thank you,

Senator Elizabeth Warren

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c756f/24c69fd9/67e1160/18ed2c2b/3083932781/VEsD/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161103_email_Warren?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all&source=WPEFEW14N_digital_email_20161105_Warrenkick_n-all")

|
---|---|---

name: Katie McGinty
subject: just 60 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
Friends, there are just three days — 60 hours — until polls open across Pennsylvania, and this race is still too close to call.

We need to give it our all before Tuesday if we’re going to win this race and give Pennsylvania’s working families a fair shake in Washington. There isn’t much time — can you pitch in to help?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20161105.4&refcode2=e20161105.4nd&amount=25

Counting on you —

Katie

---------
Katie McGinty
Candidate for U.S. Senate

* A note on donations *

There are only 3 days left in this race, and the polls are in a virtual tie. Katie is fighting for working families in PA — but we’re up against major special interest spending. Can you make a grassroots donation today to help Katie win this race and take back the Senate?
Chip in $5 today. Thank you.

Donate Now: https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/elect-katie-mcginty?refcode=e20161105.4&refcode2=e20161105.4nd&amount=25

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/6263813440159088640/4648022678702129152.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: NHGOP Press
subject: NEW DOCUMENTS PROVE HASSAN AND VAN OSTERN LIED ABOUT DARTMOUTH HITCHCOCK CONTRACT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
NEW DOCUMENTS PROVE HASSAN AND VAN OSTERN LIED ABOUT DARTMOUTH
HITCHCOCK CONTRACT

Court-Ordered Release of Documents Show Hassan, Van Ostern Knew
About Dartmouth Layoffs Before They Were Announced

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: 11/5/2016
PRESS CONTACT: Ross Berry, Press@nhgop.org

Concord- Today New Hampshire Republican State Committee Chair
Jennifer Horn released documents ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurpGzno63IsvBfAR4wLpUDm5lUvi9rEuObEAtxmxYjCS5EivseGij1aGkY2U4bkJe2Q-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuDmUHs8DdrSJOuIGssV3h0oNz19BAB3T6RFu6-2BSzs9tUSeDGkKenWBsRLULavnxoB8u-2FHCgD7VIFe-2BCJvyw6ysssJ9xbxIo4qxZ-2F-2BFYNAyTO1qCDNhJ-2Fe6IZD24f6ThJ8ztf6UGMKSUAzuEdXRfPP0TtvXMlUOAdb3gRjXNwmABDRa1A7VMYu7-2FBgUq-2BS-2FuvRRmHBUJm5jWHaEjlGqMpJa7XvWP3K3mWMGSA9HE6er0flC4RO7dDbx8T2mL3K0jTwk-2B8bcnQr3npI3UlZPpUKA-3D-3D ) that
show that Governor Maggie Hassan and Councilor Colin Van
Ostern lied when they said that they did not know about the
recent Dartmouth-Hitchcock lay-offs before they were publicly
announced by the company. The documents - released as a result
of the NHGOP lawsuit against the Hassan administration - clearly
show emails and a text that reference the lay-offs that were sent
days before the public announcement.

The timing of this lay-off announcement became an issue when
Dartmouth-Hitchcock deliberately delayed it until after the
Executive Council voted on its controversial $36 million contract
to run New Hampshire Hospital. The lay-offs were announced
on September 9, two days after the Council passed the contract
on September 7.

Coming under fire, both Governor Hassan and Councilor Van Ostern
denied knowing about the lay-offs before they were announced by
the company.

The NHGOP filed a series of Right-to-Know requests for all
documents related to these lay-offs. After stonewalling, the
Hassan Administration finally released documents that were
heavily redacted. The NHGOP retained the services of former
congressman Chuck Douglas and took the Governor to court over
these redactions. In response Judge Richard B. McNamara ordered
the state to produce what is known as a Vaughn Index, which
contains a description of the document redacted, the subject
matter, and the state’s justification for the redactions.

The documents produced by the Hassan Administration, as a result
of this court order, clearly show that members of
the Hassan administration knew about the lay-offs days before
the official announcement and were discussing it amongst
themselves:

On September 6, 2016, there was a series of emails between
Jacqueline House, Michael Power, Jeffery Rose, Carmen Lorentz,
and William Hinkle with the subject line “re: D-H Layoffs”. Note
that this was the day before the Council voted on the
Dartmouth-Hitchcock contract and three days before the company
made its official announcement.

Note that William Hinkle is the governor’s spokesman, and he is
later quoted as saying that the governor did not receive any
advance notice of the lay-offs. Jeff Rose is the commissioner for
DRED, and would be involved in any announcement of lay-offs, as
would Michael Power, who heads the unit with DRED that is
responsible for the rapid response effort the state launches in
response to lay-offs, retraining workers and otherwise providing
assistance.

On September 8, 2016 at 3:45pm, there was a text from Councilor
Van Ostern to Hassan chief of staff Pam Walsh with the subject
“re: notice of Dartmouth-Hitchcock layoff”. This is the day
after the vote, but the day before the official announcement.

After Dartmouth-Hitchcock publicly announced the lay-offs, both
Hassan and Van Ostern denied knowing about it beforehand:

Hassan:

Gov. Maggie Hassan’s office similarly learned about the planned
layoffs Friday, spokesman William Hinkle said. Hassan, a Democrat
now running for U.S. Senate, called it “disappointing and
troubling news.” (Concord Monitor ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbaIxF3L0PA8q5BHMNPPFA-2Bp4YoacJI6HwASWUEmoPwzOGjrJfOgL2K2zIp0kwgjiiY00mTsiF2v1HLcYXhOfhq4DZ6Vgqgq5LqIzm2GGU2y8HN16HIWoj5vfgYTEIPeBKB6nmEm1tRdnu7K64UjA4Ao-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuDmUHs8DdrSJOuIGssV3h0oNz19BAB3T6RFu6-2BSzs9tUSeDGkKenWBsRLULavnxoB8u-2FHCgD7VIFe-2BCJvyw6ytYU1IiPvwX141WeLWE2ZiN4JJkKK0GflCSHtjIyW-2BEcHYsw6Z0q1lQvlxX-2Fns-2F0O1Qe8xgBJbZ-2BSH3QfIMDZ-2FHaoK3C0pmOO9520fKBLaH58ZspvvGIExT688g8jHeK0b5jES1LsyHlEZONfgB1MidLxPJ2FubgPEVHTjsmeW6Dp9z6DM3QIiu7BhI1T1ttqg-3D-3D ), 9/10)

“The governor is mobilizing the state's Rapid Response Team to
provide all possible assistance to affected workers once the
layoffs take place. Gov. Hassan remains disappointed by
Dartmouth-Hitchcock's announcement, and the Governor's Office did
not receive any information regarding the layoffs prior to the
announcement,” Hinkle added. (WMUR ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=gT2AZ1ZnBy-2FrecDREa9-2BbQjZ2b4ShEPlxTd3IQ72A0K-2Bq5AzhfJunLBoqVv-2BDgyE4RfiF-2FdoNByGWXIXgZPwnNfNBFMoCr041rsGd8bqbQ28LFpa93-2F-2FiVw6XIk-2BGFvalluYLnq3tdbCvYf8Me9NVgN3BjNHB6mxclOBpv5quNG1Sfc3zC-2FBqG-2B544QWU7IU_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuDmUHs8DdrSJOuIGssV3h0oNz19BAB3T6RFu6-2BSzs9tUSeDGkKenWBsRLULavnxoB8u-2FHCgD7VIFe-2BCJvyw6yvp6Uct-2F6NHZ6AHY2Z4fJhYAXe71DZcazliN9dXMUAK4lZ63BTmMQSzAn-2Fr4Ldi4QkdDwEvZEli-2FDQpw6IMszz-2FoCv8DFH6zvUuNVL2-2BDunD812TflBR6NSWmY-2F-2FFNKU3rSdfrP3LGB5VMTbsmVL28pJQK9T5E5FXURsbrPMKqasknNjLYpoZoOcdOrnvcITlA-3D-3D ), 9/19/16)

Van Ostern:

QUESTION: I did want to touch on the controversy surrounding the
Dartmouth-Hitchcock contract to run the state’s mental health
hospital. Dartmouth-Hitchcock announcing it would lay off up to
460 employees just days after you and the other Executive
Councilors voted to give them that $36 million contract. Did you
have any idea that the layoffs were coming, and, if not, do you
feel the council was misled?

VAN OSTERN: "We were not notified and I’m disappointed to hear
about the layoffs. But I also pushed very hard to make sure that
this contract has specific staffing requirements, which, frankly,
can’t be relaxed, regardless of the layoffs. (NHPR ( http://email.robly.com/wf/click?upn=5MdO6cLza2MazVJVOHyurnjO3gInNl4hv40eH4d7sLEz0gZREv1TwxdRhDZojWXrWTYQD2yABe0Cm6uPwGTiMgYL5CPtYUZVx2UNGPHKElTpl64HbKDnf3liXKB78dvBmt3mFCodIZvtLJYDgQ-2BGww-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFb47pW8iDRAYLsM9sf9wIa92fG-2FsxU68zXzzMA2nO2VCunl2bm-2FhLXsWS8P3XITs28GUU7Mnlu37POPaWv9myv4YWBbFU9plZi0-2B42tZfBaUujH4mxA3e6jOiyDa5q6HKz45-2B17g6DUNL-2BnIMAR30MuDmUHs8DdrSJOuIGssV3h0oNz19BAB3T6RFu6-2BSzs9tUSeDGkKenWBsRLULavnxoB8u-2FHCgD7VIFe-2BCJvyw6yuBx8vA4jpzmiOD-2BONAwdL-2Fr8m-2FeLZ-2Fry7e8wLWXerynmESEAwQgE9JPMt940issqt5kXR52tRR8nvOyJ4zCqyIO1Foln2jaXxtnWFaKD439cobsb1m3mDFfxAiUeKbEzdaZcHkKaL0FmLGjUS-2FRvAosiqIT2U545hEjeZx93ozknP-2BhV1zvC8lj4wfnLNy-2F6g-3D-3D ), 9/15/16)

In response to this revelation NHGOP Chair Jennifer Horn released
the following statement:

‘It is absolutely stunning that Governor Hassan and Councilor Van
Ostern blatantly lied to the people of New Hampshire. It has
been clear from the start that they were bound and determined to
deliver this $36 million contract to one of their top donors and
that they would go to any length to get it done. They knew that
Dartmouth-Hitchcock’s layoff announcement would torpedo the
contract and they deliberately kept it from the people of New
Hampshire until after the Council voted. After the news broke,
they blatantly lied and said that they did not know about it
beforehand. To make matters even worse, in addition to lying,
Hassan has engaged in nothing short of political cover-up,
delaying the release of documents and then heavily redacting
them, trying to hide behind executive privilege. It took a court
order to get her to produce these documents, and now we know what
they were trying to hide them: these documents are the smoking
gun.”

“Governor Hassan’s administration has been engulfed in
Clintonesque scandals and cover-ups. She has engaged in
pay-to-play, rewarding her campaign donors with billions of
dollars of no bid state contracts. She has been caught accepting
tens of thousands of dollars of illegal campaign contributions.
She lied about using taxpayer funds for her out-of-state
political travel to fundraisers for her senate campaign. Her
administration was even caught engaging in collusion, rigging the
bidding process to ensure that her campaign donors got state
contracts. And when caught she has lied, stonewalled, and tried
to prevent the release of public documents. This is corruption
and cover-up of the worst sort, and it is exactly what Hillary
Clinton would do."

###
